article_title: British Steel taken into public ownership to protect 'vital' UK supply

tasks.prompt: What is the main development reported in the article?
options: British Steel was taken into public ownership to protect domestic steelmaking capability
The UK decided to stop using steel in rail projects
A private company opened a new steel plant in France
Parliament banned the recycling of scrap metal
tasks.correct_answer: British Steel was taken into public ownership to protect domestic steelmaking capability
tasks.explanation_hebrew: ההתפתחות המרכזית היא העברת British Steel לבעלות ציבורית כדי להגן על יכולת ייצור הפלדה בבריטניה.

tasks.prompt: Why does the government describe the steel supply as 'vital'?
options: It is needed only for decorative products
It supports national industry, infrastructure and supply security
It is mainly exported for luxury goods
It replaces all imported energy
tasks.correct_answer: It supports national industry, infrastructure and supply security
tasks.explanation_hebrew: הפלדה נחשבת חיונית לתעשייה, לתשתיות ולביטחון האספקה הלאומי.

tasks.prompt: What could happen if the blast furnaces stopped and later had to restart?
options: Restarting could be financially prohibitive
They would automatically produce more steel
The furnaces would convert into recycling plants
The owner would no longer need compensation
tasks.explanation_hebrew: הכתבה מסבירה שהפעלה מחדש של הכבשנים עלולה להיות יקרה מדי מבחינה כלכלית.

tasks.prompt: What does 'nationalisation' mean in this article?
options: Closing a company permanently
Moving a privately owned business into state ownership
Selling a state company to foreign investors
Reducing the number of workers
tasks.correct_answer: Moving a privately owned business into state ownership
tasks.explanation_hebrew: nationalisation פירושה העברת עסק פרטי לבעלות המדינה.

tasks.prompt: Why was an abrupt closure seen as especially disruptive?
options: It could threaten jobs, regional activity and industries that depend on British steel
It would make imported steel cheaper immediately
It would increase the output of the rail industry
It would allow blast furnaces to run continuously
tasks.correct_answer: It could threaten jobs, regional activity and industries that depend on British steel
tasks.explanation_hebrew: סגירה פתאומית הייתה עלולה לפגוע במשרות, בכלכלה האזורית ובתעשיות התלויות בפלדה.

tasks.prompt: Which statement best summarizes the government's reasoning?
options: Public ownership was chosen to preserve a strategic steel capability and avoid dependence on imports
The government wanted to end all steel production in Britain
The main goal was to replace steel with plastic
The decision was made only to increase compensation for investors
tasks.correct_answer: Public ownership was chosen to preserve a strategic steel capability and avoid dependence on imports
tasks.explanation_hebrew: הממשלה ביקשה לשמר יכולת אסטרטגית ולמנוע תלות מוגברת ביבוא.

tasks.prompt: Name two reasons given for keeping steel production in the UK.
tasks.rubric_hebrew: יש לציין שתי סיבות, כגון שמירת משרות, אספקה מקומית, תשתיות, תעשיית הרכבות או הפחתת תלות ביבוא.
expected_points: Protects jobs and the regional economy
Supports infrastructure or industries such as rail

tasks.prompt: Explain why blast furnaces are difficult to shut down temporarily.
tasks.rubric_hebrew: יש להסביר שהם מיועדים לפעול ברציפות ושעצירה והפעלה מחדש עלולות להיות מורכבות ויקרות מאוד.
expected_points: Blast furnaces are designed to run continuously
A shutdown can damage operations or require major refurbishment

tasks.prompt: Write a 2-3 sentence summary explaining what happened to British Steel and why.
tasks.rubric_hebrew: הסיכום צריך לציין את המעבר לבעלות ציבורית ואת הסיבות המרכזיות: שמירת יכולת ייצור, משרות, תשתיות והפחתת תלות ביבוא.
expected_points: States that British Steel was taken into public ownership
Explains that the move protects a vital domestic capability
Mentions jobs, infrastructure, supply security or import dependence

tasks.prompt: Write a short paragraph presenting one argument for and one possible concern about nationalising a major industrial company.
tasks.rubric_hebrew: יש להציג יתרון אפשרי אחד, כגון הגנת משרות או אספקה אסטרטגית, ולצדו חשש כגון עלות לציבור, פיצוי או יעילות.
expected_points: Presents a clear argument in favour of public ownership
Presents a realistic concern or cost
Connects both points to the British Steel case
